codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the requested UI redesign for Stats/About/Transactions and preserves business logic. One minor typography regression was introduced in the transactions address column.

issues.description: Address text was changed from monospace to sans (`font-sans`). Mission typography guidance says code-like identifiers (addresses/hashes) should remain monospace, so this is a minor readability/style regression.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Frontend typography guidance is inconsistent between the mission AGENTS file and the frontend-worker skill, which can cause avoidable implementation drift.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md line 28 says to use proportional fonts for prices/amounts and monospace only for addresses/hashes, while .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md line 29 says 'Geist Mono for prices/amounts/IDs'.

summary: Reviewed commit e0618d66 for feature stats-about-activity-redesign. The requested redesign is functionally complete with no blocking defects; only a minor non-blocking typography regression (address column monospace removed) was found.
